title: Very efficient airline with very Good stuff of the airline and bad procedures at the airports!ures at airports
text:
I always use Mackair, when I am on my annual trip in southern Africa for the fly-in - safaris in Bots/ZIM. The net is convenient, they have well- trained good pilots, lounges at airports , like Vic Falls. Negative: arriving at Vic Falls from CPT, at the baggage claim you have to put your baggage again in a screening machine before leaving the airport. Nobody can understand why. Especially elderly people are very upset about this harrassment. An international group of golfers were annoyed as their heavy bags had to be taken from the conveyor belt on a trolley, then from the trolley to the screening and on the trolley again. It is absolutely not understandable....
It is a bad impression - for the airlines/ and airports...!!

title: Professional
text: Our two flights (Kasane - Khwai River Airport - Kasane) were handled very professionally and we were always informed about the stopovers and flight times of the routes. From check-in to briefing and baggage control on the aircraft, to ensuring that every piece of luggage is with you, good organisation.

placeInfo.name: Mack Air
placeInfo.address: Airport Road, Maun, Maun, Ngamiland East 0000 Botswana

title: Exceptional Service ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
text: Mack Air recently flew our Safari group directly into the Moremi game reserve. The staff were friendly and helpful and our awesome pilot even posed for a few photos! I was so excited to be in Botswana that I got distracted and left my purse (with passport) on the plane. Right away the staff at Mack Air arranged to return my purse to me with the help of the Letaka safari team. They saved this Canadian gal from a huge fiasco and I can’t express how truly grateful I am to have flown with a company so committed to going above & beyond for their clients. I highly recommend this airline and only wish I could thank them in person.

placeInfo.name: Mack Air
placeInfo.address: Airport Road, Maun, Maun, Ngamiland East 0000 Botswana

title: Puddle Hopping Botswana with Mack Air
text:
What fun! Puddle hopping Botswana in a 12-passenger Cessna Grand Caravan EX!
Departing Kasane, we could see all the traffic on the Khwai River - elephants playing and safari boats full of tourists. We put down on a dirt field near Mababe with waiting safari trucks serving as lobby, and groves of Mopane trees as restrooms. 
We were quite the grasshopper on our return to Maun, making three stops in route on our 75 minute trip.

placeInfo.name: Mack Air
placeInfo.address: Airport Road, Maun, Maun, Ngamiland East 0000 Botswana

title: On time with great service
text:
Great service between Maun, Kasane and several lodges in between. Everything was on time with very friendly and helpful staff. Planes were in excellent condition and surprisingly comfortable for the size. 

On our last flight arriving in Kasane, our lodge was late and the staff member arranged for help and kept checking in on us every 10 mins until we were picked up. I wish our US airlines had only half the service Mack Air was providing.

placeInfo.name: Mack Air
placeInfo.address: Airport Road, Maun, Maun, Ngamiland East 0000 Botswana

title: Fly Mack Air
text: We had 100% excellent flights, service, professionalism and feeling of safety - four flights within Botswana and into Zim. .  Special mention and huge thanks to Bethel in Vic Falls who helped us through immigration when we could have had trouble. We are so grateful.

title: Great flight back to Maun
text: Took Mack Air from Kasane to Maun when no other airlines were flying. From check in to take off, the entire ride went smooth and easy. Evan did a great job of getting me and my gear safely where I needed to be.

title: Highly recommend
text: Flew to and from the Okvanga Delta on 12 seat planes both times. The planes were on time and very clean and well kept. Great flights and I would not hesitate using them again.

placeInfo.name: Mack Air

title: Great experience with MackAir
text: We had a perfect experience with MackAir to travel around Botswana. My review is based on an occurrence which has happened to us and that I’d like to share. Due to a misunderstanding between my husband and myself, we have left my backpack in the plane while disembarking! Being contacted by our lodge, MackAir arranged for it to be kept aside in Maun and “delivered” back to me the next day, on the same air strip. We were amazed by this service, worth a 5-star rating !

placeInfo.name: Mack Air
placeInfo.address: Airport Road, Maun, Maun, Ngamiland East 0000 Botswana

title: Day light robbery!
text:
I am reproducing a letter that I wrote toHello!
This is to bring to your notice the following:
1) Nine of us were booked by ULINDA Safari Trails for travel from Savuti to Kasane.
2) We were carrying bags weighing around 200kg (incl. hand bags) while the pilot Mr. Oliver declared that the same weighed 430 kg!!
3) We travelled from India by Ethiopian Airlines and we knew precisely how much each bag weighed and there was no chance that the bags could have weighed 430 kg.
4) On Aug.26th, 2023 we did travel from Victoria Falls to Chennai (India) by Ethiopian Airlines and most of the baggage tags are attached for your perusal - you will notice the weight of each bag in these and that the claim of your pilot is far fetched. The total weight is only 120 kg plus another 15kg for a person who did not travel to India. 
5) Your pilot refused to weigh the bags in my presence when he escalated the issue. What was he expecting? This question remains unanswered.
6) Your pilot informed us that only half of the bags will be loaded and did exactly this.
7) We spent USD 1550 for ferrying the bags to Victoria Falls when we realised that your Pilot had duped us.

This kind of attitude once publicised will only be a great disincentive for people to travel to Botswana, leave alone by your airline!

On a perusal of the issue you will realise the genuineness of my claim and kindly reimburse the amount of USD1550 that we spent on ferrying the bags (arranged by ULINDA SAFARI TRAILS) to Kasane.
 Mack Air and as expected, there has been no reply!

It was a nightmare to deal with the pilot of the aircraft A2-OKG! It is high time that such occurances are curbed for the good of promoting tourism in Botswana!

title: Great local company
text:
We flew with this local company from Kanase to Maun making three stops at the various microscopic airports in Botwana. We had a great time. New plane, clean and above all on time. Furthermore (which is very important) they also have an excellent airport service. They follow you from getting off the plane to checking in. Compliments.
We recommend it.

title: Great flights
text: We flew Mac air from Kasane to Okavango Delta and from Okavango Delta to Maun.  The service was great.  Our pilot from Okavango Delta showed up in a 4 seater to take us to Maun.  I was not expecting this small of a plane but the pilot was fantastic, he was funny and a very competent flyer.   I would highly recommend Mac Air.

title: A safari flight not to be forgotten over the Delta.
text: We booked an early morning flight with Mack Air. Our pilot was very friendly and competent. She went out of her way to show us beautiful scenery as well as animals.

title: Buena compañía
text: Nos hemos trasladado varías veces con ellos y teniendo en cuenta que somos una pareja con uno de los integrantes parapléjico y por tanto usuario de ruedas, teníamos serias dudas de cómo sería de complicado el acceso a la avioneta, y a efectos prácticos ha sido más fácil que subir a un gran avión comercial. title: Absolute Wohlfühl-Airline
text:
Wir haben 2 Flüge von Maun zum Jedibe Airstrip und zurück gemacht. Beide Flüge, einmal in einem 11-Sitzer, einmal in einem 5-Sitzer waren ein großes Erlebnis! Außerdem hat Mack Air eine krankheitsbedingte Umbuchung des Fluges unbürokratisch und schnell abgewickelt!
Wir können diese Airline mit extrem freundlichem Personal und Piloten nur empfehlen!

title: Flug über dem Okawango Delta
text: Unser Safari Unternehmer hat Mack Air ab Flughafen Maun vermittelt. Kosten 150 USD , Flugzeit ca. 1 Std. bis weit ins Delta hinein. Schnelle und professionelle Abwicklung der Anmeldeformalitäten. Professionelle Pilotin, gute Maschine (jeder hatte einen Fensterplatz) und hervorragende Tiersichtungen über dem  Delta.

placeInfo.name: Mack Air
placeInfo.address: Airport Road, Maun, Maun, Ngamiland East 0000 Botswana

title: Fine service
text: We have used Mack Air for two safaris into the Okavango.  Great flights with personable pilots. The modest-sized planes, with about a half-dozen passengers, can be a tad unsettling to the sensitive-stomached folks. Especially on a first flight (beginning of trip) and you are already hot. Still, by far the best way to get around.

placeInfo.name: Mack Air
placeInfo.address: Airport Road, Maun, Maun, Ngamiland East 0000 Botswana

title: Very Accomodating!
text:
PROS: Very flexible when we needed to delay our flight by a day to process covid test results. They didn’t charge us extra. Very helpful and friendly. Organized system. Good option for when borders are closed due to pandemics etc.
CONS: Expensive for a 20-minute flight but it’s the only option for flying between Kasane and Victoria Falls. Private charter flights are excessively expensive, so unless you’re really rich, don’t bother asking.
